title: What is the current state of Pump.fun trenches? What is the current meta?
summary: Pump.fun seeing resurgence - derivatives volume up 32% to $142M, token price up 9%+. Discord traders claim 70-80% win rate targeting 20-30k MC range, but data's thin on actual launch meta right now.

title: Is the Solana token BONK (DezXAZ8z7PnrnRJjz3wXBoRgixCa6xjnB7YaB1pPB263) an incoming rug — map holder concentration and c
summary: BONK is not a rug — mint/freeze authorities renounced, 1M+ holders, $1.1M liquidity locked. Top 12 wallets hold 53% but no single wallet exceeds 5.35%. The 6,084 insider wallets flagged are noise at this scale.
